reviews.comment:
Cuando esta abierto , buena atención pero tiene horario pasamos a las 23hs y no pude cargar agua porque las ficha se vende dentro del local y ya estaba cerrado. Al contrario frente a esta estación esta otra y la atención es exelente y te dan agua caliente gratis.

(Translated by Google)
When it's open, the service is good, but it has set hours. We went at 11 PM and couldn't get water because the tokens are sold inside and it was already closed. In contrast, there's another station across the street with excellent service and free hot water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3918729990868918457/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbXVDdVhREAE
